items: Work shall be performed in a horizontal position.

blocks.text: Support the door with a jack (A). Loosen the hinge mounting bolts (C). Move the front or rear door back and forth, up and down, and adjust the gap between the door and the body and the fit. If necessary, replace the door mounting bolts with service-specific bolts (D), and move the front or rear door up, down, left or right to adjust the level and build-up of the door and body. Refer to the parts catalog if service bolts are used.

items: To prevent trauma, rags and rubber pads (B) should be used on the contact area with the jack.

blocks.text: If necessary, turn the door cushion (A) to adjust the level between the door and body at the rear end of the door. Reinspect the door and body for bumps, door descents, and sightlines and gaps. Apply touch-up paint to each hinge mounting bolt, door mounting bolt, and body-to-door hinge attachment point for rust protection.
